---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.column-screen}
```{=html}
<style>
    :root { --accent: #2c3e50; }
    .hero {
        padding: 80px 0;
        background-color: #f8f9fa;
        text-align: center;
    }
    .feature-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
        gap: 20px;
        margin: 50px 0;
    }
    .feature-card {
        padding: 30px;
        border: 1px solid #eee;
        border-radius: 12px;
        text-align: center;
        background: white;
    }
    .resource-box {
        padding: 25px;
        background: white;
        border-radius: 8px;
        border: 1px solid #eaeaea;
        box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
    }
    .community-section {
        text-align: center;
        padding: 80px 0;
        background: #f4f4f4;
    }
    .container-custom {
        max-width: 1100px;
        margin: 0 auto;
        padding: 0 20px;
    }
</style>

<section class="hero">
    <div class="container-custom">
        <h1 style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 2.5rem;">Explorando o Universo R</h1>
        <p style="font-size: 1.2rem; color: #555;">Curadoria, inteligência de dados e as últimas fronteiras da computação estatística.</p>
        <div style="margin-top: 30px;">
            <a href="./postagens.html" style="background: var(--accent); color: white; padding: 15px 30px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px; font-weight: 600;">Ver Todas as Postagens</a>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>
```
:::

::: {.column-page}
```{=html}
<div class="feature-grid">
    <div class="feature-card">
        <h3 style="color: var(--accent);">Ciência de Dados</h3>
        <p>Modelagem avançada e tratamento de grandes volumes de dados.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card">
        <h3 style="color: var(--accent);">Visualização</h3>
        <p>Criação de gráficos autorais e dashboards interativos com Shiny.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card">
        <h3 style="color: var(--accent);">Educação</h3>
        <p>Treinamentos in-company e produção de conteúdo técnico.</p>
    </div>
</div>

<h2 style="border-left: 5px solid var(--accent); padding-left: 15px; margin-bottom: 30px;">Radar R: O que acompanhar</h2>
<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; margin-bottom: 60px;">
    <div class="resource-box">
        <h4 style="color: var(--accent);">Versão Atual do R</h4>
        <p>Fique de olho no <strong id="r-version">R carregando...</strong>.</p>
        <a href="[https://cran.r-project.org/doc/manuals/r-release/NEWS.html](https://cran.r-project.org/doc/manuals/r-release/NEWS.html)" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none; font-weight: bold; color: var(--accent);">Ler NEWS oficial →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="resource-box">
        <h4 style="color: var(--accent);">CRAN Task Views</h4>
        <p>O mapa definitivo para pacotes por área de atuação.</p>
        <a href="[https://cran.r-project.org/web/views/](https://cran.r-project.org/web/views/)" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none; font-weight: bold; color: var(--accent);">Explorar Task Views →</a>
    </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.column-screen}
```{=html}
<section class="community-section">
    <div class="container-custom">
        <h2>Curiosidades e Comunidade</h2>
        <p>O R é movido pela comunidade. Explore fontes globais de conhecimento.</p>
        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 20px; margin-top: 30px;">
            <a href="[https://www.r-bloggers.com/](https://www.r-bloggers.com/)" target="_blank" style="padding: 12px 25px; border: 2px solid var(--accent); text-decoration: none; color: var(--accent); font-weight: bold; border-radius: 5px;">R-Bloggers</a>
            <a href="[https://rweekly.org/](https://rweekly.org/)" target="_blank" style="padding: 12px 25px; border: 2px solid var(--accent); text-decoration: none; color: var(--accent); font-weight: bold; border-radius: 5px;">R Weekly</a>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<script>
    async function fetchRVersion() {
        try {
            const response = await fetch('[https://r-pkg.org/api/v1/r-version](https://r-pkg.org/api/v1/r-version)');
            const data = await response.json();
            if (data && data.version) {
                document.getElementById('r-version').innerText = 'R ' + data.version;
            }
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('r-version').innerText = 'R 4.3.0+'; 
        }
    }
    fetchRVersion();
</script>
```
:::
